raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Pharmacogenomic (PGx) testing can improve the quality of care for Medi-Cal patients.",
    "Coverage of evidence-based pharmacogenomic testing can lead to reductions in healthcare spending.",
    "Pharmacogenomic testing helps individuals find the correct medicine at an affordable cost.",
    "According to a study, 99% of patients have at least one genetic variant that impacts their medications.",
    "On average, an individual can exhibit an atypical response to more than ten medications.",
    "Providing coverage for pharmacogenomic testing is expected to reduce emergency department visits and hospitalizations in California.",
    "PGx testing can improve patient safety and quality of care by reducing trial and error in medication management.",
    "Women and people of color are more likely to experience preventable adverse drug events."
  ]
}
```
